case_title: BINH AN SEAFOOD USA, INC. VS. CHO SAIGON, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BINH AN SEAFOOD USA, INC. SERVED FEB-16-2010, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT CHO SAIGON, INC.

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF BINH AN SEAFOOD USA, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CHO SAIGON, INC. CHO SAIGON SUPERMARKET PHO SAIGON, INC. SAIGON SUPERMARKET SAIGON, INC. ASIA SUPERMARKET, INC.
OBJECTION TO EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF MTN TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION FILED BY DEFENDANT ASIA SUPERMARKET CORPORATION, DBA CHO-SAIGON SUPERMARKET

LAW AND MOTION 301, ARGUED; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANT ASIA SUPERMARKET CORPORATION'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE MOTION TO STAY OR DISMISS THE ACTION ON THE GROUND OF FORUM NONCONVENIENS IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S CONTACTS WITH CALIFORNIA ARE SUFFICIENT AND SUFFICIENTLY RELATED TO THIS DISPUTE TO JUSTIFY SPECIFIC JUISDICTION AND DEFENDANT HAS NOT CARRIED ITS BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT THE CASE SHOULD BE STAYED BASED ON FORUM NON CONVENIENS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. GREG GROENEVELD, TEL. NO. 308-3637 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KEVIN P. GREENQUIST OF THE WIEGEL LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 552-8230 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANT ASIA SUPERMARKET CORPORATION, DBA CHO-SAIGON'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE MOTION TO STAY OR DISMISS THE ACTION ON THE GROUND OF FORUM NONCONVENIENS IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S CONTACTS WITH CALIFORNIA ARE SUFFICIENT AND SUFFICIENTLY RELATED TO THIS DISPUTE TO JUSTIFY SPECIFIC JUISDICTION AND DEFENDANT HAS NOT CARRIED ITS BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT THE CASE SHOULD BE STAYED BASED ON FORUM NON CONVENIENS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =(301/PJB)
